class.name: IsGroupOfPdu
class.comment: FastDIS local patch: restore the missing DIS 7 IsGroupOf PDU class from the DIS6-equivalent schema so generation can treat standard row 34 as schema-backed. The grouped-entity description payload remains opaque and is preserved as raw bytes by FastDIS semantic decoding.

attribute.name: groupedEntityCategory
attribute.comment: type of entities constituting the group

attribute.name: numberOfGroupedEntities
attribute.comment: Number of individual entities constituting the group

attribute.name: groupedEntityDescriptions
attribute.comment: Grouped entity description records about each individual entity in the group
